groupSubtitle: Start with the visual deck, then move into the technical and commercial material.
title: AI-for-All Investor Deck
subtitle: Vision, problem, architecture, market and business thesis
description: Use this first in investor calls. It is structured for a clean narrative from the cost crisis in AI to the 70/20/10 architecture and market opportunity.

groupSubtitle: Start with the visual deck, then move into the technical and commercial material.
title: Architecture & Product Brief
subtitle: How routing, edge inference and cloud fallback work together
description: A tighter technical note for investors who want the system logic, cost reduction mechanics and the product deployment path in one place.

groupSubtitle: Start with the visual deck, then move into the technical and commercial material.
title: Global AI Access Gap
subtitle: Why AI must be optimized for data-poor smartphone users, not only the top 1%
description: This note explains the scale problem in AI, the access gap in emerging markets, and why AI-for-All uses edge-cloud orchestration to route most low-token queries on-device and cut costs by 50-80%.

groupSubtitle: Share direct contact details and company links without forcing investors to search elsewhere.

description: A clean contact page for follow-ups after the first meeting, with direct access to your email, LinkedIn and the live AI-for-All site.
